record.field: Main super-class for regular database-persisted Odoo models. Odoo models are created by inheriting from this class:: class user(Model): ... The system will later instantiate the class once per database (on which the class' module is installed).

Main super-class for regular database-persisted Odoo models. Odoo models are created by inheriting from this class:: class user(Model): ... The system will later instantiate the class once per database (on which the class' module is installed).

Main super-class for regular database-persisted Odoo models. Odoo models are created by inheriting from this class:: class user(Model): ... The system will later instantiate the class once per database (on which the class' module is installed).

Main super-class for regular database-persisted Odoo models. Odoo models are created by inheriting from this class:: class user(Model): ... The system will later instantiate the class once per database (on which the class' module is installed).
